name: Public Sector (DACH)
description: Federal, state, and municipal government agencies and public institutions in DACH with mandatory data sovereignty and BSI compliance requirements.

tam.description: European public sector cloud and IT modernization spending
tam.source: LLM estimate based on Bitkom, ISG public sector cloud reports 2025

sam.description: DACH public sector cloud infrastructure and managed services
sam.source: LLM estimate: Germany alone budgets ~EUR 2.5B for federal/state IT modernization; Austria and Switzerland add ~EUR 1B combined

som.description: 50 public sector accounts x EUR 5M average ACV over 3 years
som.source: Bottom-up estimate: T-Systems holds existing framework contracts with federal and state agencies; targeting 50 active cloud engagements
